---
title: "Improvement and progress"
subtitle: "Milestone 3"
categories: "Project"
---

By this point you've received feedback on your proposal & should have identified which of your two proposed datasets you're moving forward with. This milestone prompts you to begin making progress on your analysis and corresponding write-up.

# Goals

The goals of this milestone are as follows:

-   Incorporate feedback from your proposal
-   Make progress on your project prior to the peer review

# Instructions

Everybody on the team should have at least one commit to the project repo since milestone 2 was submitted.
At the very least, these commits should:

-   explicitly close ALL issues opened as proposal feedback;
-   load the data into the main project .qmd (`index.qmd`) file;
-   generate one visualization of the data.

# Grading

This milestone will be graded for completion, not accuracy.
We will check to see if the team has made commits to their repo since project milestone 2 and closed all issues that were opened as part of proposal feedback.

-   0 points: No commits since project milestone 2

-   1 point: not everyone has committed

-   2-4 points: not all issues closed, no visualization, etc.

-   5 points: everyone committed, all issues closed, one figure generated.

::: callout-note
There won't be a lab session dedicated to this milestone.
You are to work with your team outside of class time to complete this task.
:::
